storyBeat: 愚公門口兩座大山 — 出門很不方便

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Tonight's story has a few new words. Let's learn them first!
questions.sentenceZh: 今晚的故事會用到幾個新字，我們先把它們學會！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：今晚要講愚公移山的故事，先來認識幾個關鍵字，記住了故事更好聽喔！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
這四個字都在愚公移山的故事裡：
🔑 mountain = 山
🔑 old man = 老人
🔑 son = 兒子
🔑 river = 河

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Four more words — can you match them all?
questions.explanationZh:
再來四個：
🔑 dig = 挖
🔑 basket = 籃子
🔑 rock = 石頭
🔑 dirt = 泥土

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which one is a mountain?
questions.question: Which one is a mountain?
questions.explanationZh: mountain = 山 ⛰️！故事裡愚公的家就在兩座大山中間，出門很不方便。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which one shows someone digging?
questions.question: Which one shows someone digging?
questions.explanationZh: dig = 挖 ⛏️！愚公一家用工具挖山，一籃一籃把石頭和泥土搬走。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old man carried a basket of rock to the river.
questions.sentenceZh: 老人把一籃石頭搬到河邊。
questions.question: Which picture matches the sentence?
options: an old man sitting and reading near a window
a boy running fast along an empty road
a white-haired grandpa taking a basket to a river
a woman cooking soup in a warm kitchen
optionsZh: 男孩沿著空路快速奔跑
白髮爺爺提著籃子走向河邊
questions.explanationZh: basket = 籃子，river = 河——老人提著籃子走向河邊，這就對了！

storyBeat: 愚公決定移山 — 鄰居問: 這可能嗎?

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: A few more words to learn — then the story begins!
questions.sentenceZh: 再記幾個字，故事就要開始了！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：再學幾個重要的字，學會了，故事就更好懂囉！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese phrase to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
這四個片語都出現在愚公移山的故事裡：
🔑 move away = 搬走
🔑 big mountain = 大山
🔑 little by little = 一點一點
🔑 every day = 每天

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The son dug dirt from the hill and put it in a basket.
questions.sentenceZh: 兒子從山坡上挖泥土，裝進籃子裡。
questions.question: Which picture matches the sentence?
options: a boy digging soil and filling a basket
a girl planting seeds in a garden bed
a man fishing at the edge of a river
a child drawing a picture on white paper
questions.explanationZh: dig = 挖，dirt = 泥土，basket = 籃子——男孩挖土裝進籃子，這就是故事裡愚公一家做的事！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which one shows a river?
questions.question: Which one shows a river?
questions.explanationZh: river = 河 🌊！愚公一家每天把石頭和泥土搬到河邊去，走了好遠好遠的路。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every day, the old man ___ rocks to the river.
questions.question: Which word is correct?
questions.explanationZh:
「every day」= 老爺爺天天都做的事——說一個人天天做的事,字尾要多個 s,所以用「carries」喔。
完整句：Every day, the old man carries rocks to the river.

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Let's review all the new words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
把這節的重點字再複習一遍：
🔑 move away = 搬走
🔑 dig = 挖
🔑 rock = 石頭
🔑 every day = 每天

storyBeat: 兒子和孫子都來幫 — 該怎麼運?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 son = 兒子
🔑 grandson = 孫子
🔑 basket = 籃子
🔑 stone = 石頭
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The next morning, his sons came out with big baskets.
questions.explanationZh: 第二天早上,兒子們拿著大籃子出來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His grandsons came too, with smaller baskets in small hands.
questions.question: Who else came to help that morning?
options: the youngest kids of the family
questions.explanationZh: 「grandsons + small hands」——小手拿小籃子來幫忙——就是「家裡最小的孩子們」也來了!
questions.sentenceZh: 孫子們也來了,小手提著小一點的籃子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Three sizes of baskets stood by the door in a neat row.
questions.questionEn: Were three generations working together?
questions.explanationZh: 「三種大小」——大的、中的、小的——大人、大孩子、小孩子「三代一起」來幫忙了呢!
questions.sentenceZh: 門口整整齊齊擺著三種不同大小的籃子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They asked, "How should we carry all this stone?"
questions.explanationZh: 他們問:「我們該怎麼運這麼多石頭?」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Yu Gong said, "Take it to the river, one basket at a time."
questions.question: Where did Yu Gong want them to take the stone?
options: down to the water, bit by bit
up onto the roof of the house
back into the cave, one by one
questions.explanationZh: 「river + one basket at a time」——目的地是河邊,而且一籃一籃慢慢搬,就是「到水邊,一點一點地搬」!
questions.sentenceZh: 愚公說:「搬到河邊,一籃一籃慢慢搬。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The whole family picked up the baskets and began to work.
questions.explanationZh: 全家人拿起籃子,開始幹活。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Each person carried what they could, from the biggest to the smallest.
questions.question: How did each person help?
questions.explanationZh: 「each carried what they could」——每個人都盡力幫忙,就是「每個人各盡其力」,多溫暖的一家人!
questions.sentenceZh: 每個人各自搬自己能搬的,從最大到最小都有。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They walked to the river and back. The sun was high in the sky.
questions.explanationZh: 他們走到河邊再走回來。太陽已經高高掛著。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the family feel working together?
questions.question: How did they feel?
questions.explanationZh: 三代一起、各盡其力——這就是「像團隊一樣親近」的溫暖感覺!
questions.sentenceZh: 全家一起工作的時候,是什麼感覺?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But the mountains still looked just as tall as before...
questions.explanationZh: 但山看起來還是跟以前一樣高……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 🔑 籃子 = basket｜🔑 石頭 = stone｜🔑 河 = river｜🔑 每天 = every day。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The next morning, his sons and grandsons came with baskets.
questions.sentenceZh: 第二天早上,他的兒子和孫子拿著籃子來了。
questions.question: Who came to help Yu Gong the next morning?
questions.explanationZh: 「他的兒子和孫子拿著籃子來了」——是自家人來幫忙!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The next morning, his sons came out with big baskets to start the work.
questions.sentenceZh: 第二天早上,他的兒子和孫子拿著籃子來了。
questions.questionEn: Did the family wait many days before starting the work?
questions.explanationZh: 「第二天早上」——隔天就來了,一天都沒有多等喔!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They carried stones and dirt in baskets down to the sea.
questions.sentenceZh: 他們用籃子把石頭和土運到河裡。
questions.question: What did the family carry in their baskets?
questions.explanationZh: 「把石頭和土運走」——他們搬的是山上的石頭和土!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They carried stones and dirt in baskets down to the sea.
questions.sentenceZh: 他們用籃子把石頭和土運到河裡。
questions.question: Which emoji shows people working hard together?
questions.explanationZh: 搬石頭和土——這是要用力氣的工作!💪 就是那個努力的樣子!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The next morning, his sons and grandsons came with baskets.
questions.sentenceZh: 第二天早上,他的兒子和孫子拿著籃子來了。
questions.questionEn: Did the family bring empty hands to the work site?
questions.explanationZh: 「拿著籃子來」——他們帶了籃子,可不是空手來的喔!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They carried stones and dirt in baskets down to the sea.
questions.sentenceZh: 他們用籃子把石頭和土運到河裡。
questions.question: Where did they take the stones and dirt?
options: into a hole in the ground
questions.explanationZh: 「運到河裡」——石頭和土被運到河裡(海邊)去了!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They ___ stones and dirt in baskets down to the sea.
questions.sentenceZh: 他們用籃子___石頭和土帶到海邊。
questions.question: Choose the correct verb form.
questions.explanationZh: 他們「搬走了」石頭和泥土——說發生過的事,carry 要變成 carried 喔。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They carried stones and dirt in baskets down to the sea.
questions.sentenceZh: 他們用籃子把石頭和土運到河裡。
questions.questionEn: Was this work something that could be finished in one hour?
questions.explanationZh: 搬整座山的石頭——一個小時哪裡夠呢!

storyBeat: 一筐土一筐土運走 — 路人笑他

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 dirt = 泥土
🔑 day = 一天
🔑 river = 河
🔑 laugh = 笑
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every day they took one basket of stone and dirt away.
questions.explanationZh: 每天他們搬走一籃石頭和泥土。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The work was slow, but the family never stopped.
questions.question: How fast did the work go each day?
questions.explanationZh: 「slow + never stopped」——慢是慢,但一直做、不放棄——就是「慢但持續」的精神!
questions.sentenceZh: 工作很慢,但全家人從來沒有停下來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The walk to the river was very long under the bright sun.
questions.questionEn: Was the daily trip tiring for the family?
questions.explanationZh: 「很遠 + 大太陽下走」——頂著大太陽走遠路,當然很累呀!
questions.sentenceZh: 在大太陽下走到河邊,路好遠好遠。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A man passing by stopped to watch them.
questions.explanationZh: 一個路過的男人停下來看他們。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He laughed and said, "You are old. You cannot finish this."
questions.question: What did the man passing by think?
options: this job was way too big
the lost dog must be near
questions.explanationZh: 「laughed + cannot finish」——笑著說做不完——他覺得「這工作太大了」,沒辦法完成!
questions.sentenceZh: 他笑著說:「你年紀這麼大,這個做不完的。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Yu Gong heard him but did not stop walking.
questions.explanationZh: 愚公聽見他的話,但沒有停下腳步。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He kept his basket up and kept his eyes on the path.
questions.question: What did Yu Gong choose to do?
options: stop and go home to rest
sit down by the road and cry
questions.explanationZh: 「kept basket up + eyes on path」——沒有停下來,繼續走——就是「帶著籃子繼續走」!完全不受打擾!
questions.sentenceZh: 他繼續舉著籃子,眼睛直視前方的路。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His sons and grandsons walked right behind him.
questions.explanationZh: 兒子們和孫子們就走在他後面。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the family answer the man's laughing words?
questions.question: What did the family do?
questions.explanationZh: 兒子孫子都繼續跟在後面走——答案就是「一起繼續走」,沒有理他們!
questions.sentenceZh: 面對那個男人的嘲笑,全家人怎麼回應?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But the man had one more question, and this one was harder...
questions.explanationZh: 但那個男人還有一個問題,而且更難回答……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 🔑 路人 = passerby｜🔑 笑 = laugh｜🔑 老了 = old｜🔑 完成 = finish。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Day after day, the family dug and carried and never stopped.
questions.sentenceZh: 日復一日,全家人挖、搬、一直不停。
questions.question: How did the family work on the mountains?
questions.explanationZh: 「日復一日、一直不停」——每天都在做,從未停下!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Day after day, the family dug and carried and never stopped.
questions.sentenceZh: 日復一日,全家人挖、搬、一直不停。
questions.questionEn: Did the family take breaks and stop working often?
questions.explanationZh: 「一直不停」——他們一天接一天,從不停歇呢!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A man walking by stopped and shook his head.
questions.sentenceZh: 一個路人走過來停下,搖了搖頭。
questions.question: What did the passerby do when he saw the work?
questions.explanationZh: 「停下來、搖了搖頭」——路人不贊成,才搖頭!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A man walking by stopped and shook his head.
questions.sentenceZh: 一個路人走過來停下,搖了搖頭。
questions.question: Which emoji shows someone shaking their head in doubt?
questions.explanationZh: 路人搖頭——就是 🙅 那個不贊成的動作!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A man passing by stopped to watch them work.
questions.sentenceZh: 一個路人走過來停下,搖了搖頭。
questions.questionEn: Did the passerby believe Yu Gong could succeed?
questions.explanationZh: 他搖頭——搖頭就是不相信呀!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The man said, 'You are old. You will never finish this.'
questions.sentenceZh: 那個人說:「你老了,你永遠做不完這個。」
questions.question: What reason did the passerby give for doubting Yu Gong?
options: the road was already good enough
all of the baskets were broken
the old man would never live to see it done
questions.explanationZh: 「你老了,做不完」——路人覺得愚公太老是問題所在!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The man said, 'You are old. You will never finish this.'
questions.sentenceZh: 那個人說:「你老了,你永遠做不完這個。」
questions.questionEn: Did the passerby think Yu Gong would complete the work one day?
questions.explanationZh: 「永遠做不完」——他認為根本不可能完成呢!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Day after day, the family dug and carried and never stopped.
questions.sentenceZh: 日復一日,全家人挖、搬、一直不停。
questions.question: What does 'day after day' tell us about the family?
options: their effort never paused or slowed
optionsZh: 他們只有休息好才工作
questions.explanationZh: 「日復一日、從不停止」——這正是堅持不懈的精神!

questions.sentence: They never stopped.
questions.explanationZh: 『never stopped』= 從來不停下來。故事裡愚公一家每天都繼續工作，用 never 表示『從不』！
questions.sentenceZh: 他們每天都不停下來。

questions.sentence: He laughed and said this.
questions.explanationZh: 『laughed』就是『笑了』——說發生過的事，laugh 後面加 -ed。路人嘲笑愚公，覺得他做不完——but the family kept going anyway！
questions.sentenceZh: 那個男人大笑並說你做不完這個。

questions.sentence: He kept his eyes on the path.
questions.answer: He kept his eyes on the path.
accept: Yu Gong looked ahead and walked on.
He walked on and looked straight ahead.
He kept looking at the path ahead.
questions.explanationZh: 『kept his eyes on the path』= 眼睛一直看著路。表示愚公不受嘲笑影響，繼續專注向前——這是很有力量的一句話！
questions.sentenceZh: 愚公繼續走，眼睛看著前方的路。

questions.sentence: Every day they took one basket of stone and dirt away.
questions.question: What does Yu Gong's plan of moving one basket at a time show about him?
options: he was too weak to carry more at once
he had no plan and just tried his best
he trusted that small steps would add up
he wanted to stop after enough trips
optionsZh: 他相信一小步一小步累積起來能成功
他打算跑幾趟之後就停下來
questions.explanationZh: 愚公每天只搬一籃——這不是因為虛弱，也不是沒計畫，而是他相信只要持續累積，終究能完成大事。選項 C 描述的是這種『一點一點、終能成功』的信念。

storyBeat: 路人說: 你死後誰繼續? — 愚公的回答

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 after = 以後
🔑 keep going = 繼續
🔑 stand up = 站直
🔑 look at = 看著
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The man asked, "After you are gone, who will keep going?"
questions.explanationZh: 男人問:「等你以後不在了,誰會繼續做?」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The man wanted to know about the days after Yu Gong was old.
questions.question: What was the man's hard question about?
options: how much each basket would cost
who would carry on much later
what color each stone really was
which path led into the town
optionsZh: 每顆石頭真正是什麼顏色
questions.explanationZh: 「after Yu Gong is old」——問的是「以後誰會繼續做下去」——年老了、不在了,還有誰接著做?
questions.sentenceZh: 那個男人想問的,是愚公老了以後的事。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Yu Gong put down his basket and stood up tall.
questions.questionEn: Was Yu Gong ready to give a careful answer?
questions.explanationZh: 「放下籃子 + 站直」——特地停下來、站好,就是「準備好好回答」了呢!
questions.sentenceZh: 愚公放下籃子,站直了身子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He looked at his sons and his small grandsons.
questions.explanationZh: 他看著兒子們和小孫子們。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He saw three sizes of his family standing right there.
questions.question: Who did Yu Gong see when he looked around?
options: only his oldest son, no one else
a row of strangers he did not know
people from old, young, and youngest
a long line of farm animals
optionsZh: 一排他不認識的陌生人
questions.explanationZh: 「three sizes of family」——大的中的小的都有——就是「老中少都有」,三代都在身旁!
questions.sentenceZh: 他看到三種大小的家人就站在眼前。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The whole field grew quiet. Even the wind seemed to wait.
questions.explanationZh: 整片田都安靜下來。連風好像都在等。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Everyone leaned in. No one wanted to miss what came next.
questions.question: How did the people around feel right then?
questions.explanationZh: 「leaned in + did not want to miss」——靠近聽、不想錯過——就是「專心聽他的回答」!
questions.sentenceZh: 大家都湊近了,誰都不想錯過接下來的話。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Yu Gong took a long, soft breath.
questions.explanationZh: 愚公深深地、輕輕地吸了一口氣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What was the field like as Yu Gong got ready to speak?
questions.question: How was the field?
questions.explanationZh: 「安靜 + 連風都在等」——所有東西都靜下來了,就是「靜靜在等」的感覺!
questions.sentenceZh: 愚公準備說話的時候,田裡是什麼氣氛?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He smiled and gave a quiet, kind answer...
questions.explanationZh: 他微笑著,給出一個溫柔安靜的回答……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 🔑 after you go = 死了以後｜🔑 continue = 繼續｜🔑 put down = 放下｜🔑 stand up = 站起來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The man asked, 'When you are gone, who will carry on?'
questions.sentenceZh: 那個人問:「你死了以後,誰來繼續?」
questions.question: What was the man's challenge to Yu Gong?
options: who carries on after the old man is gone
how big the digging baskets are
questions.explanationZh: 「你死了以後,誰來繼續」——挑戰的就是「誰接手」的問題!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Yu Gong looked at his sons and his small grandsons.
questions.sentenceZh: 那個人問:「你死了以後,誰來繼續?」
questions.questionEn: Was the man trying to encourage Yu Gong?
questions.explanationZh: 這個問題是在質疑愚公——不是鼓勵,是挑戰喔!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Yu Gong put down his basket and stood up tall.
questions.sentenceZh: 愚公放下籃子,站了起來。
questions.question: What did Yu Gong do before answering the man?
options: lowered his load and rose up
questions.explanationZh: 「放下籃子、站了起來」——他鄭重地準備好要回答!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Yu Gong put down his basket and stood up tall.
questions.sentenceZh: 愚公放下籃子,站了起來。
questions.question: Which emoji shows standing up with confidence?
questions.explanationZh: 「站了起來」——就是那個 🧍 站得筆直、充滿自信的樣子!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Yu Gong put down his basket and stood up tall.
questions.sentenceZh: 愚公放下籃子,站了起來。
questions.questionEn: Did Yu Gong seem scared or defeated before answering?
questions.explanationZh: 他是「站起來」——這是有底氣的動作,一點都不害怕呢!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The man asked, 'When you are gone, who will carry on?'
questions.sentenceZh: 那個人問:「你死了以後,誰來繼續?」
questions.question: What did the man think was the biggest problem?
options: no one would keep working after Yu Gong
the mountains were too smooth to dig
optionsZh: 愚公之後沒人繼續工作
questions.explanationZh: 「誰來繼續」——那個人認為沒人會接手是最大的問題!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Yu Gong put down his basket and stood up tall.
questions.sentenceZh: 愚公放下籃子,站了起來。
questions.questionEn: Did Yu Gong keep working without stopping to respond?
questions.explanationZh: 他「放下籃子」——是停下來準備回答,不是繼續搬喔!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The man asked, 'When you are gone, who will carry on?'
questions.sentenceZh: 那個人問:「你死了以後,誰來繼續?」
questions.question: Why was this a hard question for most people?
options: it was too long to understand
it pointed to a real limit
optionsZh: 它指出了一個真實的限制
questions.explanationZh: 一個人的時間有限——「你死後誰繼續」正是指出了這個限制!

storyBeat: 我有兒子 兒子有孫子 子子孫孫無窮匱

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 forever = 永遠
🔑 grow = 長大
🔑 move away = 搬走
🔑 together = 一起
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "I have sons. My sons have sons too."
questions.explanationZh: 「我有兒子。我的兒子也會有兒子。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "My grandsons will have sons too, and on and on."
questions.question: What did Yu Gong mean about his family?
options: just one son living in each home
family that moves to new towns
generations would carry the task forward
questions.explanationZh: 「sons have sons + on and on」——一代接著一代,「家會一直延續下去」!多麼寬廣的眼光呀!
questions.sentenceZh: 「我的孫子也會有兒子,一直一直下去。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Our family will go on forever and ever," he said softly.
questions.questionEn: Did Yu Gong believe his family would continue?
questions.explanationZh: 「forever and ever」——永遠永遠——他相信家會「一直延續」下去嘛!
questions.sentenceZh: 「我們的家人永遠永遠都會在,」他輕輕說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "But the mountains cannot grow any bigger."
questions.explanationZh: 「可是山不會再變大了。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The mountains stay the same size, but family keeps growing.
questions.question: What was the big difference Yu Gong saw?
options: both grow at the same time
questions.explanationZh: 「山不變 + 家延續」——對比很清楚——「家會長大,山不會」!這就是愚公的聰明之處!
questions.sentenceZh: 山的大小不變,但家人一代一代長下去。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Day by day, we will move them away."
questions.explanationZh: 「一天又一天,我們會把山搬走。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He spoke without anger and without any rush at all.
questions.question: How did Yu Gong sound when he said this?
questions.explanationZh: 「沒有生氣 + 沒有急」——穩穩的、不慌不忙——這就是「平靜又自信」的樣子!
questions.sentenceZh: 他說話的時候沒有生氣,也沒有一點急。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The man passing by had no answer. He walked away in silence.
questions.explanationZh: 那個路過的男人答不出話。他默默走開了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the family feel after Yu Gong's answer?
questions.question: How did the family feel?
questions.explanationZh: 「子子孫孫永遠」的大道理——家人當然「振奮又驕傲」,跟著老人的腳步一起走下去!
questions.sentenceZh: 聽完愚公的回答,全家人是什麼感覺?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Far above, kind giants from the sky leaned forward to watch...
questions.explanationZh: 在很高很高的天上,溫柔的巨人探身往下看……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 🔑 兒子 = son｜🔑 孫子 = grandson｜🔑 永遠 = forever｜🔑 變大 = grow bigger。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Yu Gong said, 'I have sons. My sons have sons.'
questions.sentenceZh: 愚公說:「我有兒子。我的兒子有兒子。」
questions.question: What point was Yu Gong making about his family?
options: his sons had all moved to the city
his sons were stronger than him
generations after him would continue the task
all of his sons were still very young
optionsZh: 他的兒子搬到城市去了
他的家人會一代接著一代
questions.explanationZh: 「兒子有兒子」——一代傳一代,家人永遠不會斷!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Yu Gong said, 'I have sons. My sons have sons.'
questions.sentenceZh: 愚公說:「我有兒子。我的兒子有兒子。」
questions.questionEn: Was Yu Gong saying his family line would end with him?
questions.explanationZh: 「兒子有兒子」——他說的是家族會一直延續,不會終止喔!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The mountains cannot grow bigger. But my family goes on forever.
questions.sentenceZh: 山不能變更大。但我的家人永遠存在。
questions.question: What was Yu Gong's key argument?
options: people keep going but peaks stay the same
optionsZh: 家族永不斷但山不會變大
questions.explanationZh: 「山不能變更大,但家人永遠有」——這就是愚公最關鍵的邏輯!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: My family goes on forever.
questions.sentenceZh: 我的家人永遠存在。
questions.question: Which emoji shows something that goes on and on?
questions.explanationZh: 「永遠」——就是 ♾️ 無限的意思,沒有終點!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The mountains cannot grow bigger. But my family goes on forever.
questions.sentenceZh: 山不能變更大。但我的家人永遠存在。
questions.questionEn: Did Yu Gong believe the mountains could get taller over time?
questions.explanationZh: 「山不能變更大」——他清楚得很,山不會越長越高呢!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Yu Gong said, 'I have sons. My sons have sons.'
questions.sentenceZh: 愚公說:「我有兒子。我的兒子有兒子。」
questions.question: How did Yu Gong answer the challenge about time?
options: his family would carry on the work
he asked the neighbor to help
optionsZh: 他的家人會繼續做這件事
questions.explanationZh: 「兒子有兒子」——家人會一代接一代地繼續工作!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The mountains cannot grow bigger. But my family goes on forever.
questions.sentenceZh: 山不能變更大。但我的家人永遠存在。
questions.questionEn: Was Yu Gong's argument hard to argue against?
questions.explanationZh: 山不會長大,但家族無窮無盡——這個道理很難反駁呀!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The mountains cannot grow bigger. But my family goes on forever.
questions.sentenceZh: 山不能變更大。但我的家人永遠存在。
questions.question: What does Yu Gong's logic show about him?
optionsZh: 展現出超出外表的智慧
questions.explanationZh: 「山不能長大,家人能一直有」——這個想法非常聰明!比外表更有智慧。

storyBeat: 天神感動派人搬走山 — 學到堅持

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 sky = 天空
🔑 giant = 巨人
🔑 watch = 看見
🔑 heart = 心
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Far above, kind giants from the sky were watching.
questions.explanationZh: 在很高的天上,溫柔的巨人在看著。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: These were not regular people. They were kind giants from above.
questions.question: Who was watching the family from far above?
questions.explanationZh: 「kind giants from above」——天上來的溫柔巨人!選「天空的溫柔巨人」!
questions.sentenceZh: 這些不是一般的人,是從天上來的溫柔巨人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They watched the small family for many quiet days.
questions.questionEn: Did the giants take time to watch before doing anything?
questions.explanationZh: 「好幾天 + 安靜地看」——天神慢慢看、仔細觀察,看清楚了才行動呢!
questions.sentenceZh: 他們默默觀察這個小家庭好多天。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They saw the family work together with strong hearts.
questions.explanationZh: 他們看見全家人用堅強的心一起工作。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The giants felt warm inside when they saw such teamwork.
questions.question: What touched the giants' hearts most?
questions.explanationZh: 「warm inside + teamwork」——看到他們一起工作,心裡感動——最打動巨人的就是「家人一起工作的樣子」!
questions.sentenceZh: 巨人看到這樣的團隊合作,心裡暖暖的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They came down softly and very, very slowly.
questions.explanationZh: 他們輕輕地、慢慢地降到下面。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: With gentle hands, they lifted the two big peaks far off.
questions.question: What did the kind giants do for the family?
options: gave them new shoes for walking
took the high rocks somewhere else
taught them new songs to sing
brought them more dirt and stone
optionsZh: 把高高的岩石搬到別的地方
送他們更多泥土和石頭
questions.explanationZh: 「lifted two peaks far off」——用手把山頂搬走——就是「把高高的岩石搬到別的地方」!
questions.sentenceZh: 他們用溫柔的雙手,把兩座山的頂峰搬到遠遠的地方。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: From that day, the family had a clear road out to the world.
questions.explanationZh: 從那天起,這一家有了一條通往外面世界的開闊大路。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What is the big lesson from Yu Gong's family?
questions.question: What did they learn?
questions.explanationZh: 一筐又一筐、子子孫孫繼續——這個故事告訴我們「一天又一天堅持下去」的力量,永不放棄!
questions.sentenceZh: 愚公一家的故事,帶給我們什麼大道理?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: And every child who heard the story walked home holding hands with grown-ups...
questions.explanationZh: 每個聽完故事的小孩,都牽著大人的手走回家……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 🔑 天神 = sky giant｜🔑 搬走 = lift away｜🔑 感動 = moved｜🔑 路暢通 = clear road。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Then, kind giants from the sky came down and saw what the family was doing.
questions.sentenceZh: 後來,天上善良的巨人下來,看到了這一家人在做的事。
questions.question: Who came from the sky to help?
options: a group of wise old teachers
questions.explanationZh: 「天上善良的巨人下來」——是天神來幫忙了!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They were moved by the family's hard work and strong heart.
questions.sentenceZh: 他們被這一家人的努力和堅強感動了。
questions.questionEn: Did the giants help because the family asked them to?
questions.explanationZh: 是天神被「感動了」才來幫——可不是誰要求他們的喔!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They lifted both mountains away, and the road was clear.
questions.sentenceZh: 他們把兩座山都搬走了,路通了。
questions.question: What happened after the giants helped?
options: the family had to start over
questions.explanationZh: 「兩座山都搬走了,路通了」——終於路通了!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They lifted both mountains away, and the road was clear.
questions.sentenceZh: 他們把兩座山都搬走了,路通了。
questions.question: Which emoji shows a clear open road?
questions.explanationZh: 「路通了」——就是 🛣️ 那條暢通的大路!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They lifted both mountains away, and the road was clear.
questions.sentenceZh: 他們把兩座山都搬走了,路通了。
questions.questionEn: Were both mountains moved by the giants?
questions.explanationZh: 「兩座山都搬走了」——一座不留,路一下子就開了呢!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They were moved by the family's hard work and strong heart.
questions.sentenceZh: 他們被這一家人的努力和堅強感動了。
questions.question: What impressed the giants most?
options: the size of the baskets used
the family's effort and strong will
optionsZh: 這家人的努力和堅強意志
questions.explanationZh: 「努力和堅強感動了巨人」——讓天神感動的是那份努力和堅強!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: People still tell this story to say: if you never give up, great things can happen.
questions.sentenceZh: 人們仍然講這個故事:如果你不放棄,大事就能發生。
questions.questionEn: Does this story say that giving up is a good idea?
questions.explanationZh: 故事說「不放棄,大事就能發生」——放棄可不是這個故事要教我們的喔!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: People still tell this story to say: if you never give up, great things can happen.
questions.sentenceZh: 人們仍然講這個故事:如果你不放棄,大事就能發生。
questions.question: What is the main message of this story?
options: always wait for help from above
mountains are too big to move at all
old people should rest and not work
never give up and big things happen
questions.explanationZh: 「不放棄,大事就能發生」——這正是愚公移山的精神!
